fields.name: name
fields.description: Full name of the lead person, or null if not present in the content

fields.name: contact
fields.description: How to reach the lead: email address, phone number, or social handle (e.g. @username). Null if not present.

fields.name: source
fields.description: Where the lead came from, e.g. 'X DM', 'cold email', 'referral', 'LinkedIn', or 'unknown' if not determinable

fields.name: need
fields.description: Short description (one sentence, always in English regardless of the input language) of what the lead wants or needs

fields.name: date
fields.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) the lead reached out. If no date is stated in the content, use the submission date given in the instructions.

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Any other relevant context, always in English: budget, timeline, company, urgency, etc. Empty string if nothing else relevant.
